defs: Qi, a Zhou Dynasty vassal state
lit. the fear held by a man of 杞[Qi3] that the sky would fall (idiom)
lit. like the man of 杞[Qi3] who feared the sky would fall (idiom)
the State of Qǐ in modern Qǐ county 杞縣|杞县, Henan (c. 1500-445 BC), a small vassal state of Shang and Western Zhou for most of its existence
see 杞人之憂|杞人之忧[Qi3 ren2 zhi1 you1]
see 杞人憂天|杞人忧天[Qi3 ren2 you1 tian1]
see 杞人之憂|杞人之忧[Qi3 ren2 zhi1 you1]
the wife of 杞梁[Qi3 Liang2], a senior official of the state of Qi 杞[Qi3] who died on a military expedition
Qi County or Qixian, a county in Kaifeng City 開封市|开封市[Kai1 feng1 Shi4], Henan
